name: LADSON HICKORY NATURAL
description: Ladson Hickory Natural showcases the dramatic, contrasting grain and extreme hardness of real hickory wood. The robust engineered core guarantees that the floor won't warp or cup, making it suitable for above or below-grade installations.

name: LADSON HICKORY COGNAC
description: The Cognac finish transforms robust hickory into a warm, inviting masterpiece with rich auburn and amber highlights. The hand-scraped texture provides a rustic, lived-in feel while masking everyday wear effortlessly.

name: LADSON MAPLE ESPRESSO
description: Ladson Maple Espresso offers an ultra-smooth, dark, and sophisticated look. The tight grain of maple takes the deep espresso stain beautifully, resulting in a luxurious, formal floor perfect for dining rooms and executive offices.
